headline: This build shifts Ryokoplan away from a rough prototype feel and toward a more finished product surface by unifying control sizing, tightening card proportions, calming section spacing, and improving mobile and desktop visual balance across the main loops.
notes: Standardizes button, chip, and control sizing so navigation, actions, filters, and sticky tools feel like one coherent product system.
Refines cards, cover modules, and section spacing so homepage, Magazine, My Trips, and result surfaces feel less like stacked prototypes and more like a consistent editorial product.
Improves mobile rhythm with cleaner top-bar spacing, better action sizing, stronger input fields, and more balanced first-fold layouts on small screens while keeping desktop proportions tighter too.
